media.info:
This one piece is in either Aeolian or Phrygian, because I can't tell the difference by ear -- it's one of my beautiful piano passages cut straight from "Cursed Carnival."


It's an interesting piece that marked the moment where I turned from being unconfident to being trusting in my talent... It also sounds more Toby Fox-ey than usual!
media.title: Piano #4

media.info:
Good Morning!


This song encapsulates the feeling of innocence of a child blooming in the morning, ready for a new day. The sun beams through the window, the birds chirp... ah -- to be only a child...

In it I also prove the point that drums are what give the energy to a track... no music is at its happiest without a kick-ass drum glueing it together.
media.title: Good Morning!

media.info:
This is the theme for Mystery Kid, one of my favourite characters from Inner Voices.


MK is actually older than Inner Voices, being created in 2016 for a whatsapp roleplay group -- they were my first non-cringe character and everyone loved their game-shows and vintage meta-humour.


Can you feel the bouncy fun of a friday evening magic/comedy show... with the mystery of an unkown character?
media.title: Card Deal

media.info:
This is a version of Card Deal... but kind of annoyed!

Don't piss Mystery Kid off too much, haha!


This song feels like a big "hey buddy, don't keep going that way" warning kind of situation.

It also shows that a good melody worst even in different tempos... and how only a different tempo creates a completely different feel.
media.title: Danger Hand

media.info:
This is a song that encapsulates the fake feeling of peacefulness of someone who has never felt the warmth of other humans... living alone in a cabin within the snow and the fire, labelling themselves as 'happy' ignorant to how lonely they truly are.

It was based of C418's Dry Hands. It's not as good, but I made myself feel things... so it's good.
media.title: Ephemeral

media.info:
This is the second song I made for Inner Voices -- it forms a pair with 'Hearts in Sync.'


It gave the identity to Inner Voices as a whole, the slight synthwave inspo representing The Angel, and each instrument representing one of the four heroes.
media.title: Harmony Hall

media.info:
Theme for Pirate Princess, a very quirky one-off individual... who musn't give up hope, even one the direst of situations!


The first music of the game I felt was "perfect," for my definition of perfect:


It's very simple, but I'd change nothing about it.
media.title: Lapsed Doll

media.info: A music for a very important reveal in Inner Voices... it's apparent calmness and seriousness underscore the impact of the reveal... as it leaves the player not angry or with any strong emotions... but profoundly intrigued.
media.title: The Deal

media.info:
The first song I made for Inner Voices... and the key to its identity when it comes to battles.

A song for the first battle in Inner Voices where you're not scared to death! Isn't it great to finally be with your friends and easily defeat the enemies?


This song combines jazz and rock into one big mess of genres that is very simple AND corny... but heartfelt.
media.title: Hearts in Sync
